2c:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Disaster Recovery"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Protect your agent's memory with Mnemosyne's built-in disaster recovery module and backup procedures."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.dr.recovery"}]," module handles everything: compressed backups with checksums, automated restore, integrity verification, health checks, and rotation. It's already installed with every Mnemosyne package."]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"A backup you can't restore is worthless"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Schedule monthly restore drills. The DR module makes this trivially scriptable."}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Reference"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Backup\npython -m mnemosyne.dr backup\n\n# Restore from latest valid backup\npython -m mnemosyne.dr emergency\n\n# Restore a specific backup\npython -m mnemosyne.dr restore ~/.mnemosyne/backups/mnemosyne_backup_20260530_120000.db.gz\n\n# Verify database integrity\npython -m mnemosyne.dr verify\n\n# Full health check\npython -m mnemosyne.dr health\n\n# List available backups\npython -m mnemosyne.dr list\n\n# Rotate backups (keep last 10)\npython -m mnemosyne.dr rotate\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Creating Backups"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Using the DR Module"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.dr.recovery import create_backup\n\n# Default paths (~/.mnemosyne/data/)\nresult = create_backup()\nprint(result)\n# {\n#   \"backup_path\": \"/root/.mnemosyne/backups/mnemosyne_backup_20260530_120000.db.gz\",\n#   \"metadata_path\": \"/root/.mnemosyne/backups/mnemosyne_backup_20260530_120000.db.gz.json\",\n#   \"original_size\": 5242880,\n#   \"backup_size\": 1048576,\n#   \"db_checksum\": \"a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8\",\n#   \"backup_checksum\": \"h8g7f6e5d4c3b2a1\",\n#   \"compressed\": true\n# }\n\n# Custom paths\ncreate_backup(\n    db_path=\"/data/mnemosyne.db\",\n    backup_dir=\"/backups/mnemosyne\"\n)\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Backups are gzip-compressed SQL dumps with checksummed metadata. The module uses SQLite's online backup API (lock-aware, WAL-safe — won't produce a torn file under concurrent write load)."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Direct SQLite Backup"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For environments where you can't run Python:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Hot backup (SQLite supports concurrent reads)\ncp mnemosyne.db mnemosyne-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d).db\n\n# With verification\nsqlite3 mnemosyne.db \".backup to mnemosyne-backup.db\"\nsqlite3 mnemosyne-backup.db \"PRAGMA integrity_check\"\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Restoring"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Automated Emergency Restore"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Scans all backups in order of recency and restores the first one that passes integrity check. Best for unattended recovery."}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.dr.recovery import emergency_restore\n\nresult = emergency_restore()\n# {\n#   \"restored\": true,\n#   \"backup_used\": \"/root/.mnemosyne/backups/mnemosyne_backup_20260530_120000.db.gz\",\n#   \"integrity_check\": true\n# }\n"}]}],"\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28"],["$L29"],"$L2a"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"rL0kYsxstwPZl4oDnLrmK"}
4:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Restore a Specific Backup"}]
5:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from pathlib import Path\nfrom mnemosyne.dr.recovery import restore_backup\n\nresult = restore_backup(\n    backup_path=Path(\"/backups/mnemosyne_backup_20260530_120000.db.gz\"),\n    db_path=Path(\"/data/mnemosyne.db\")\n)\n"}]}]
6:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Safety First"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Restore always creates an emergency backup of the current database first (",["$","code",null,{"children":"{db}.emergency_backup.db"}],"). You can roll back if the restore wasn't what you expected."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
7:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Manual Restore"}]
8:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# From file copy\ncp mnemosyne-backup-20260425.db mnemosyne.db\n\n# Verify\nsqlite3 mnemosyne.db \"PRAGMA integrity_check\"\n"}]}]
9:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Integrity Verification"}]
a:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.dr.recovery import verify_integrity\n\nis_valid = verify_integrity(\"/data/mnemosyne.db\")\n# True if database passes SQLite's PRAGMA integrity_check\n"}]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"restore_backup()"}]," function runs this automatically and includes the result in its return dict."]}]
c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Health Checks"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run a comprehensive health check of the entire Mnemosyne system — database integrity, backup availability, and status summary."}]
e:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.dr.recovery import health_check\n\nstatus = health_check()\n# {\n#   \"database\": {\n#     \"exists\": true,\n#     \"valid\": true,\n#     \"path\": \"/root/.mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\",\n#     \"message\": \"Database integrity verified\"\n#   },\n#   \"backups\": {\n#     \"total\": 14,\n#     \"latest\": \"/root/.mnemosyne/backups/mnemosyne_backup_20260530_120000.db.gz\",\n#     \"directory\": \"/root/.mnemosyne/backups/\"\n#   },\n#   \"status\": \"healthy\"\n# }\n"}]}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Or from the CLI:"}]
10:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python -m mnemosyne.dr health\n"}]}]
11:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Backup Management"}]
12:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"List Available Backups"}]
13:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.dr.recovery import list_backups\n\nbackups = list_backups()\nfor b in backups:\n    print(f\"{b['name']} — {b['size']} bytes — {b['modified']}\")\n"}]}]
14:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Rotation"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":"Keep the most recent N backups and remove the rest."}]
16:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.dr.recovery import rotate_backups\n\n# Keep last 20 backups (default: 10)\nresult = rotate_backups(keep=20)\nprint(f\"Deleted {result['deleted']} old backups\")\n"}]}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":["The rotation preserves both the ",["$","code",null,{"children":".db.gz"}]," file and its ",["$","code",null,{"children":".gz.json"}]," metadata sidecar."]}]
18:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Automated Backups"}]
19:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Via Cron (Recommended)"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Add to your crontab for daily automated backups with rotation:"}]
1b:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Daily at 3 AM — backup then prune to keep last 14\n0 3 * * * cd /home/your-user && \\\n  python3 -m mnemosyne.dr backup && \\\n  python3 -m mnemosyne.dr rotate --keep 14 >> /var/log/mnemosyne-backup.log 2>&1\n"}]}]
1c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Via Hermes Cron"}]
1d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"hermes cron create \\\n  --name \"mnemosyne-daily-backup\" \\\n  --schedule \"0 3 * * *\" \\\n  --task \"Run mnemosyne.dr backup and rotate to keep last 14\" \\\n  --target local\n"}]}]
1e:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Via Systemd Timer"}]
1f:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"# /etc/systemd/system/mnemosyne-backup.service\n[Unit]\nDescription=Mnemosyne daily backup\n\n[Service]\nType=oneshot\nExecStart=python3 -m mnemosyne.dr backup\nExecStartPost=python3 -m mnemosyne.dr rotate --keep 14\nUser=your-user\n\n# /etc/systemd/system/mnemosyne-backup.timer\n[Unit]\nDescription=Run Mnemosyne backup daily\n\n[Timer]\nOnCalendar=daily\nPersistent=true\n\n[Install]\nWantedBy=timers.target\n"}]}]
20:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Retention Policy"}]
21:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Backup Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Frequency"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Retention"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Hourly"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Every hour"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"24 hours"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"cron + dr.rotate(24)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Daily"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Every day"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"30 days"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"cron + dr.rotate(30)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Weekly"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Every week"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"12 weeks"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"systemd timer + dr.rotate(12)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Monthly"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Every month"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"12 months"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"manual or external (S3)"}]]}]]}]]}]
22:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"External Replication"}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":"For off-server redundancy, combine the DR module with cloud storage:"}]
24:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Backup + ship to S3\npython3 -m mnemosyne.dr backup && \\\n  aws s3 sync ~/.mnemosyne/backups/ s3://my-backups/mnemosyne/\n"}]}]
25:["$","p",null,{"children":["Or use ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://litestream.io","children":"Litestream"}]," for continuous WAL-based replication to S3:"]}]
26:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# /etc/litestream.yml\ndbs:\n  - path: /data/mnemosyne.db\n    replicas:\n      - url: s3://mybucket/mnemosyne\n        retention: 720h\n"}]}]
27:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Recovery Playbook"}]
28:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Scenario"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Action"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Database corrupted"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.dr emergency"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Specific backup restore"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.dr restore <backup-path>"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Verify after restore"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.dr verify"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Check if backups exist"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.dr health"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Clean up old backups"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.dr rotate"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Migrate to new server"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Export JSON + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_import"}]," tool"]}]]}]]}]]}]
29:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01o_465-h6ryu.js","async":true}]
2a:["$","$L2b",null,{"children":["$","$2c",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@2d"}]}]
